hero.infoLine2Prefix: Just walk in. Groups of 6 people or more: reservation via

hours.weekdays: Mon to Thu from 4pm to Midnight

about.pullQuote: Plunge in, move with it and enjoy life's circus
about.body: Bar Bassie is the rooftop bar perched at the very top of Ghent's Wintercircus. Cooling drinks, sharable small plates, and a front-row seat overlooking the central arena.

location.label: Location
location.body: Set inside Ghent's iconic Wintercircus, all the way at the top, the bar's interior flows into a rooftop terrace with sweeping views over the city skyline — a front-row seat overlooking the central arena.
location.floorplanCaption: Enter via Lammerstraat 13 — take the elevator to the 4th floor

jobs.label: Jobs
jobs.heading: Work with us at Bassie
jobs.intro: We're a small rooftop crew at the Wintercircus. Long summer nights, sharp drinks, sharable plates, and a view that does the heavy lifting. If you want in, here's what we're looking for right now.
jobs.noOpenings: No current openings. Send us a hello anyway.
jobs.openApplicationLine: Don't see a fit? Send an open application to

reserve.label: Reserve
reserve.groups: For groups of 6 or more, message us on WhatsApp and we'll set you up.
reserve.whatsappPrefill: Hi Bassie! We'd love to reserve a table —
